summary: Backend 10/10 pytest passes (products list, brand filter, price+sort, featured, get by id + 404, brands, reviews=6, order create/get + 404). Frontend home/catalog/product/about/reviews/cart/checkout pages all load and Buy Now → cart drawer → checkout flow renders. However several data-testid attributes that the main agent advertised in the agent_to_agent_context_note are MISSING from the UI, blocking automated regression on filters, size selection, cart qty, and checkout submission.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid `filter-brand-Nike` / `filter-brand-all` not found on DOM (pills render visually but lack the documented testid). Could be using different casing or different attr name.
Size buttons render (7/8/9/10/11 visible in screenshot) but no element matches `[data-testid^="size-btn-"]`. Selection cannot be automated.

`cart-qty-inc-*` and `cart-qty-dec-*` testids not present (only `cart-remove-*` was found). Quantity +/- cannot be tested. Also Buy Now appears to push directly into a checkout drawer state rather than a cart drawer with qty controls.

Checkout form inputs lack the documented testids `checkout-name`, `checkout-email`, `checkout-phone`, `checkout-address`, `checkout-city`. Test could not fill the form; submit click triggered native HTML5 'Please fill out this field' validation on empty Full Name.
After submit no element with `data-testid="checkout-success"` was found (could not verify because form wasn't filled, but selector should still be reviewed).

issues: Initial render shows large empty/dark rectangles before filter sidebar/cards hydrate — looks like a skeleton without visual loading cue. Verify skeleton vs. real empty state.

action_items: Add `data-testid="filter-brand-{Brand}"` (and `filter-brand-all`) on catalog brand pills matching the casing used in tests.
Add `data-testid="size-btn-{size}"` on each size option in ProductPage.
Add `data-testid="cart-qty-inc-{id}"` and `cart-qty-dec-{id}"` to cart drawer quantity controls.
Add testids on checkout inputs: `checkout-name`, `checkout-email`, `checkout-phone`, `checkout-address`, `checkout-city`, and `checkout-success` on the success confirmation block.
Confirm Buy Now flow: should it open cart drawer (with qty +/- and a separate `cart-checkout-btn`) or jump straight to checkout panel? Currently it appears to jump straight to a checkout drawer.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handlers (FastAPI deprecation).
list_brands does N+1 count queries; use an aggregation $group for efficiency.
OrderCreate accepts client-supplied `total` — server should recompute total from items*price to prevent tampering (mock checkout, but still good practice).
Product `image` field uses external Unsplash URLs — fine for demo but flag as production risk (rate limits, dead links).

success_rate.frontend: ~70% (core flows render & navigate; automation blocked on missing testids)

seed_data_creation: None — relied on server.py auto-seed (24 products, 6 reviews verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid; rerun /app/backend/tests/test_osneakers_api.py for regression. For frontend, after main agent adds the missing data-testids, re-run Playwright covering: catalog brand filter, sort dropdown, price slider refetch, size selection, cart qty inc/dec, full checkout form submission, and verify success state shows an order_number starting with 'OS'. Note: Footer email/phone, navbar nav, hero, marquee, featured grid and review pages all already verified visually & via DOM.
